blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 640 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
